zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy I de Luxembourg於1340年出生在法國德 艾斯特姆斯利--巴洛斯時，他的父親Jean I de Luxembourg27歲，母親Alix of Dampierre18歲。他於1354年與Mahaut de Châtillon結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1371年8月22日在海因里希_海普洛文次亞琛亞琛享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy I de Luxembourg于1340年出生在法国德 艾斯特姆斯利--巴洛斯时，他的父亲Jean I de Luxembourg27岁，母亲Alix of Dampierre18岁。他于1354年与Mahaut de Châtillon结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1371年8月22日在海因里希_海普洛文次亞琛亞琛享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy I de Luxembourg was born in 1340, in Ligny-en-Barrois, Meuse, Grand Est, France, his father, Jean I de Luxembourg, was 27 and his mother, Alix of Dampierre, was 18. He married Mahaut de Châtillon in 1354. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 August 1371, in Aachen, Aachen, Rhineland, Prussia, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy I de Luxembourg est né en 1340, à Ligny-en-Barrois, Meuse, Grand Est, France, son père, Jean I de Luxembourg, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alix of Dampierre, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mahaut de Châtillon en 1354. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 août 1371, à Aix-la-Chapelle, Aachen, Rhénanie, Prusse, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy I de Luxembourg 1340 in Ligny-en-Barrois, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean I de Luxembourg 27 und seine Mutter Alix of Dampierre 18. Er hat 1354 Mahaut de Châtillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1371 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Aachen, Aachen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy I de Luxembourg è nato il nel 1340 nel Ligny-en-Barrois, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Jean I de Luxembourg, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alix of Dampierre, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mahaut de Châtillon nel 1354. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1371, nel Aachen, Aachen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy I de Luxembourgが1340年にフランスグランド エストメウゼリグニー-エン-バーロイスで生まれた時，父Jean I de Luxembourgは27歳，母Alix of Dampierreは18歳であった。1354年にMahaut de Châtillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1371年8月22日にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズアーチェンアーチェンで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy I de Luxembourg(이)가 1340년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 리그니--바로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean I de Luxembourg(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix of Dampierre(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1354년 Mahaut de Châtillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1371년 8월 22일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 아악헨 아악헨에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy I de Luxembourg nasceu em 1340, em Ligny-en-Barrois, Meuse, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Jean I de Luxembourg, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alix of Dampierre, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mahaut de Châtillon em 1354. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1371, em Aachen, Aachen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy I de Luxembourg родился в 1340 г. в местности лигни-ен-барроис, меус, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean I de Luxembourg было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix of Dampierre, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mahaut de Châtillon в 1354 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 августа 1371 г. в местности аачэн, аачэн, раинпровинз, Пруссия в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy I de Luxembourg nació en 1340, en Ligny-en-Barrois, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Jean I de Luxembourg, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Alix of Dampierre, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mahaut de Châtillon en 1354. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1371, en Aachen, Aachen, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, a la edad de 31 años.
